calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Transfer
Off Calendar Apr-05-2016 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Steneberg for (petitioner) Stephen Dale.

The Court stated that Contra Costa is the principal place of administration. Ms. Steneberg stated that the court has the discretion of retaining venue here, that there have been no objections and asked the court to retain venue until after this accounting and then they can petition for change of venue or asked if the court would transfer it on its own motion so that the file will go to Contra Costa County. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Cohen for and with Stephen Dale (Trustee).

The Court signed the Ex Parte Order Adding North Bay Housing Coalition To Bond For Special Needs Trust. Status on filing of bond was set for August 1, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties addressed the issue of the Trustee's fees/efforts as well as Wells Fargo Bank's fees/efforts. The accounting petition (Wells Fargo's fees) was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-06-2012 Continued To Jul-18-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Garry Cohen for and with Stephen Dale (Trustee/Petitioner). Craig Jorgensen Bond Agent also present.

Mr. Cohen and Mr. Dale addressed the issues/concerns raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to structual issues with the Trust, bonding of NBHC, Trustee's fees, fees paid to Wells Fargo, accounting of time spent, Attorney's fees, etc. The Court wants to see an accounting of Mr. Dale's, Ms. Eble's and Wells Fargo time with respect to what efforts have gone into earning of fees. The accounting petition was continued to July 18, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for additional information to be provided with regard to the above.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
